text:
is a line of toys produced by MegaHouse. This line had a collaboration with Rebuild of Evangelion. The figures are based on designs made by the artist rondo bell.

There are two figures after the first release: a pre-painted PVC figure pilot with 8 centimeters in height that can pose and is articulated. And a power loader mecha that can be boarded by the pilot figure. It is mostly 15 centimeters in height. Each design also comes with acessories used by the Evangelions in each movie. The figures are also capable of attaching prefabricated weapons to the hands and other parts. Due to Built-in hard points common to the series, perfect compatibility with the normal series, making it highly customizable. https://www.megatreshop.jp/products/item/515/
